notes: Post-fix rerun of Arm B. retrieval_health=ok and qualified_count=3 with non-zero entities returned, in contrast to the pre-fix bug where QualificationScorer reportedly returned zero entities ~61% of the time. Salva correctly surfaced TSMC's official English homepage and company profile page. No WebSearch queries were needed since the two tsmc.com URLs directly satisfy the official-website request; the Yahoo Finance result is tangential (financial listing, not a direct contact page) but not incorrect. No explicit phone/email contact entity was surfaced by Salva itself -- the company_profile page is the closest proxy for contact info.
